document_api_meta.title: Get Inbound Order
document_api_meta.env_desc: This API is used to retrieve the inbound order details including the planned inbound detail, actual inbound detail and inbound status, etc.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: order_ids
request_query_param.desc:
The list of numeric identifiers of the inbound orders to fetch information for.  
**Note:** Provide the numeric sequence only; do not include the "IBR" prefix (e.g., use `123456` instead of `IBR123456`). There is a **limit of 10 orders** to be fetched in each request.

You can get the value in `data.inbound_order_id` in [Inbound FBT order status change](6708f866a88d1103246fed6a) webhook or in `data.inventory_records.order.id` in the response of [Search FBT Inventory Record](670d584ba83c5f030f3071e4).

request_query_param.name: include_carton_details
request_query_param.desc:
A boolean flag that determines whether the response should include granular information for each individual carton within the shipment.

**Note**: When set to `true`, the response will include the `carton_details` field. If set to `false` or omitted, this field will be excluded from the response payload to optimize performance.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^inbound_orders
response_param.desc: A list of inbound order detail information.

response_param.name: ^^order_id
response_param.desc: The numeric identifier for inbound order in Fulfilled by TikTok system.

response_param.name: ^^order_id_string
response_param.desc: The string identifier for inbound order in Fulfilled by TikTok system.

response_param.name: ^^order_plan_id
response_param.desc: Plan identifier for the inbound order.

response_param.name: ^^merchant
response_param.desc: Information regarding the merchant who owns the order.

response_param.name: ^^^id
response_param.desc: The identifier of the merchant in Fulfilled by TikTok system.

response_param.name: ^^^name
response_param.desc: Name of the Fulfilled by TikTok merchant.

response_param.name: ^^create_time
response_param.desc: Unix seconds timestamp when the inbound order was created.

response_param.name: ^^ship_time
response_param.desc: Unix seconds timestamp when the inbound order was shipped.

response_param.name: ^^expected_arrival_time
response_param.desc: Unix seconds timestamp of the expected arrival time provided by merchant.

response_param.name: ^^actual_arrival_time
response_param.desc: Unix seconds timestamp of the actual arrival time of the inbound order.

response_param.name: ^^warehouse
response_param.desc: Warehouse information.

response_param.name: ^^^fbt_warehouse_id
response_param.desc: The identifier for warehouse generated by Fulfilled by TikTok system.

response_param.name: ^^^business_warehouse_ids
response_param.desc: The business identifier for warehouse generated by TikTok Shop system, correlated with the `fbt_warehouse_id`.

response_param.name: ^^^name
response_param.desc: The Fulfilled by TikTok warehouse name.

response_param.name: ^^^type
response_param.desc:
Type of warehouse associated with the inbound order.

Possible values:
* `HUB`
* `FC` (Fulfillment Center)

response_param.name: ^^status_logs
response_param.desc: A list of inbound order operation history.

response_param.name: ^^^operate_time
response_param.desc: The time when the inbound order is processed by the merchant or warehouses, represented as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

response_param.name: ^^^new_status
response_param.desc:
The order status in **Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT)** warehouse after this operation.

**Possible values:**
* `WORKING`
* `READY_TO_SHIP`
* `TO_BE_RECEIVED`
* `ARRIVED_HUB`
* `INTERNAL_TRANSFER`
* `RECEIVING`
* `PARTIALLY_RECEIVED`
* `RECEIVED`
* `CANCELLED`
* `DELIVERED`

response_param.name: ^^^previous_status
response_param.desc:
The order status in **Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT)** warehouse before this operation.

**Possible values:**
* `WORKING`
* `READY_TO_SHIP`
* `TO_BE_RECEIVED`
* `ARRIVED_HUB`
* `INTERNAL_TRANSFER`
* `RECEIVING`
* `PARTIALLY_RECEIVED`
* `RECEIVED`
* `CANCELLED`
* `DELIVERED`

response_param.name: ^^^operator
response_param.desc: The unique identifier or name of the user or system entity that performed the status change.

response_param.name: ^^logistic_info_list
response_param.desc: List of logistics information tied to the order. Only populated for small-parcel inbound orders.

response_param.name: ^^^provider_name
response_param.desc:
Name of the logistics service provider

Possible values:
* `FEDEX` (Federal Express)
* `UPS` (United Parcel Service)
* `DHL` (DHL Express)
* `USPS` (United States Postal Service)
* `OTHER` (All other logistics providers)

response_param.name: ^^^waybill_number
response_param.desc: The tracking number for the current inbound shipment with the carrier.

response_param.name: ^^^related_number
response_param.desc: Carton number tied to the logistics information.

response_param.name: ^^carton_details
response_param.desc: Detailed carton information for the inbound order. Only populated if `include_carton_detail` is passed as true in the request.

response_param.name: ^^^carton_no
response_param.desc: Carton number.

response_param.name: ^^^carton_type
response_param.desc:
Whether this carton is single-SKU or multi-SKU.

**Possible values:**
* `SINGLE_SKU`
* `MULTI_SKU`

response_param.name: ^^^box_measurements
response_param.desc: Carton measurement.

response_param.name: ^^^^weight
response_param.desc: Carton weight.

response_param.name: ^^^^weight_unit
response_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the weight of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `KILOGRAM` (kg)
* `GRAM` (g)
* `MILLIGRAM` (mg)
* `POUNDS` (lbs)
* `OUNCE` (oz)

response_param.name: ^^^^width
response_param.desc: Carton width.

response_param.name: ^^^^height
response_param.desc: Carton height.

response_param.name: ^^^^length
response_param.desc: Carton length.

response_param.name: ^^^^length_unit
response_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the dimensions (length, width, height) of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `METER` (m)
* `CENTIMETER` (cm)
* `MILLIMETER` (mm)
* `FOOT` (ft)
* `MICRON` (μm)
* `INCH` (in)

response_param.name: ^^^items
response_param.desc: List of items in this carton.

response_param.name: ^^^^goods_id
response_param.desc: Identifier for goods within the Fulfilled by TikTok system.

response_param.name: ^^^^quantity
response_param.desc: Quantity of this goods lot in th ecarton.

response_param.name: ^^inbound_goods_lot_receive_item_details
response_param.desc: A detailed breakdown of planned versus actual receiving information, segmented by item, lot number, and expiration date.

response_param.name: ^^^goods_id
response_param.desc: The unique numeric identifier of the goods within Fulfilled by TikTok.

response_param.name: ^^^lot_code
response_param.desc: The specific batch or lot number assigned by the manufacturer for this group of items.

response_param.name: ^^^expiration_time
response_param.desc: The expiration date of the items in this lot, provided as a Unix timestamp in **seconds**.

response_param.name: ^^^planned_count
response_param.desc: The total quantity of this specific lot expected to be received as part of the inbound order.

response_param.name: ^^^normal_received_count
response_param.desc: The quantity of items received at **fulfillment centers** in sellable (good) condition for this lot. If the inbound order is sent to a hub, this value will only be updated when the goods are subsequently transferred to the fulfillment center.

response_param.name: ^^^defective_received_count
response_param.desc: The quantity of items received in a damaged or unsellable state.

response_param.name: ^^^total_received_count
response_param.desc: The sum of both `normal_received_count` and `defective_received_count`.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Request or request parameters are empty. Please recheck the input parameters.
No inbound orders found for the merchant.
Number of orders in request exceeds the configured limit.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
